title: Thermal:GrowableOres Compat
body:
A simple compatibility mod addd recipe to make **Growable Ores** work properly with **Thermal** machines.

The **Phytogenic Insolator** can properly grow **Growable Ore Cane**.

The **Separator** can correctly process the harvested cane into its expected outputs.
![2025-08-07 212540.jpg](https://s2.loli.net/2025/08/07/rdOZYftsBkWbgGM.jpg)
![2025-08-07 212253.jpg](https://s2.loli.net/2025/08/07/QGWHI3dzpfi8RmA.jpg)
#### For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
